message:
🌱 Add envoy: Support for HTTP/1.0 mission (#1682)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "envoy-170-support-for-http-1-0",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "envoy: Support for HTTP/1.0",
+    "description": "Support for HTTP/1.0. Requested by 18+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current envoy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your envoy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nhelm list -n envoy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working envoy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review envoy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant envoy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get configmap -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=envoy\n```\nEnvoy responds to an HTTP/1.0 request with an upgrade request\n\n```\nGET / HTTP/1.0\n\nHTTP/1.1 426 Upgrade Required\nserver: envoy\ndate: Mon, 24 Oct 2016 2159 GMT\nx-envoy-protocol-version: HTTP/1.1\ncontent-length: 0\n\n```\n\nIt would be nice to support 1.0"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for HTTP/1.0",
+        "description": "Allowing incoming HTTP/1.0 (if configured)\n\n*handles HTTP/1.0 connection close logic (close unless Connection: keep-alive)\n*dechunks responses\n*allows for empty host (given configured default host)\n\n*Risk Level*: Medium (config guarded but still messing with connection manager internals)\n*Testing*:\n```yaml\nGET / HTTP/1.0\n\nHTTP/1.1 426 Upgrade Required\nserver: envoy\ndate: Mon, 24 Oct 2016 21:11:59 GMT\nx-envoy-protocol-version: HTTP/1.1\ncontent-length: 0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get events -n envoy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for HTTP/1.0\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Allowing incoming HTTP/1.0 (if configured)\n\n*handles HTTP/1.0 connection close logic (close unless Connection: keep-alive)\n*dechunks responses\n*allows for empty host (given configured default host)\n\n*Risk Level*: Medium (config guarded but still messing with connection manager internals)\n*Testing*:  Added new integration tests of HTTP/1.0 and the listed features.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "GET / HTTP/1.0\n\nHTTP/1.1 426 Upgrade Required\nserver: envoy\ndate: Mon, 24 Oct 2016 21:11:59 GMT\nx-envoy-protocol-version: HTTP/1.1\ncontent-length: 0"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "envoy",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "envoy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/170",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/pull/2792"
+    },
+    "reactions": 18,
+    "comments": 30,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with envoy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-23T06:32:00.522Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
